title: Rebuild 20 Movie Poster
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild 2.0 Movie Poster             Quote Post by chubdeuce » Tue Nov 24, 2009 4:17 pm Was wondering if anyone knows where I could get the Rebuild of Evangelion 2.0 Movie Poster. Preferably in original Japanese with as few obscuring words as possible (see link below). http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/1/13/RoE20Poster.jpg Ideally it would be over the net since I just realized I wanted it after I got back from Japan =/ Thanks

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Tue Nov 24, 2009 7:34 pm Nice poster. For me the one to get would be the scribble style orange background 2.0 poster with Unit 01 on it. In either case, both posters are pretty hard to find in any size over the internet. Most Japanese film posters that you can find over the web especially those on Ebay are only the size of a 8"11" sheet of paper. I want something bigger. At least in the 11"17 size. If you want anything bigger its going to cost you. And most of the websites that do carry these rare posters are Japanese sites. Since i cant read Japanese its going to make it just that much harder. I myself have had a tough time tracking them down. I personally dont want to buy any reproductions that people sell where they have just photocopied the original. Also wallscrolls dont do it for me either. I wouldnt mind if someone else around here who knows where to obtain these can help us out too.

[]:             Quote Post by darthikari » Tue Nov 24, 2009 10:51 pm It makes me want to cry when I type this, but many years ago a friend of mine went to live in Japan for six months. He asked me if there was anything I wanted him to pick up while he was there. While he couldn't find the items I requested, He did get an original movie theater one-sheet poster from End Of Evangelion... The one with the cast floating in the red sea, with fetal position Asuka front and center. Things weren't anime-friendly at my house those days, and I had to store it at another friend's house until I moved out...and he had two cats...that weren't feeling too well....You can imagine the rest.....

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue Nov 24, 2009 11:02 pm darthikari wrote: It makes me want to cry when I type this, but many years ago a friend of mine went to live in Japan for six months. He asked me if there was anything I wanted him to pick up while he was there. While he couldn't find the items I requested, He did get an original movie theater one-sheet poster from End Of Evangelion... The one with the cast floating in the red sea, with fetal position Asuka front and center. Things weren't anime-friendly at my house those days, and I had to store it at another friend's house until I moved out...and he had two cats...that weren't feeling too well....You can imagine the rest.....

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Tue Nov 24, 2009 11:07 pm schismatics wrote: I just made myself a translated version of that poster. If you're handy with Photoshop 'n stuff you could grab the image from here and just take it to some print shop. Cost me $3.

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Tue Nov 24, 2009 11:45 pm Electric Sachiel wrote: Wallscrolls also dont cut it for me either.

[]:             Quote Post by AVman9 » Wed Nov 25, 2009 12:56 am Gamer_2k4 wrote: Too bad there aren't any decent Elfen Lied scrolls... =/

[]:             Quote Post by chubdeuce » Wed Nov 25, 2009 8:13 am Electric Sachiel wrote: Nice poster. For me the one to get would be the scribble style orange background 2.0 poster with Unit 01 on it. I wouldnt mind if someone else around here who knows where to obtain these can help us out too.

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Wed Nov 25, 2009 1:54 pm chubdeuce wrote: Well managed to find a site that has yours. Although only in 11x17. That same site has the 1.0 poster in Chinese in full 27x40, but I kinda want Asuka and Mari in there. That and there's way too much text on that. The 2.0 they have is sadly 11x17 only. Anyone else find anything yet? Edit: Whoops, perhaps linking to the site would help. http://www.moviegoods.com/movie_poster/evangelion_10_you_are_not_alone_2007.htm http://www.moviegoods.com/movie_product_static.asp?master_movie_id=53472&sku=516211

[]:             Quote Post by chubdeuce » Thu Nov 26, 2009 8:08 am Thanks for the links. However, i already took visited those websites both on Ebay and on their official site. The fact that they have shipping restrictions to Canada is bad enough. But they i've also heard complaints from some people that their posters are bad quality goods. God i want that poster bad......

[]:             Quote Post by Electric Sachiel » Mon Nov 30, 2009 3:31 pm So.....as a general update, nobody here in the entire Evageeks forums knows or is aware of any potential dealers that sell official Japanese movie posters? Ones that might carry the recent film posters for the Rebuild movies? Man when it comes to Eva merchandising and knowledge of them, seems like hardly anyone here is an expert.......

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon Nov 30, 2009 5:42 pm So I found an error in the Poster http://www.moviegoods.com/movie_product_static.asp?master_movie_id=53472&sku=516212 Lets see if you can find the error Don't click unless you give up! SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue Dec 01, 2009 10:40 am Holy balls that one with the cross explosion is SWEET. But I think I'd rather photoshooop that one that buy it for $19.99.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Tue Dec 01, 2009 11:23 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: So I found an error in the Poster http://www.moviegoods.com/movie_product_static.asp?master_movie_id=53472&sku=516212 Lets see if you can find the error Don't click unless you give up! SPOILER: Show

Preferably in original Japanese with as few obscuring words as possible (see link below). http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/1/13/RoE20Poster.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri Dec 04, 2009 10:56 pm NEEEEEEEDDDDD TTOOOOO BUYYYYYYYY! edit: nvm, its only 11x17.....tiny
